caption: A man wearing a grey, tall, sculpted wig, glasses, a white dress shirt, a red bowtie, and tan suspenders is seated in a studio setting. He wears black headphones and sits behind a professional microphone. The background consists of a wall decorated with numerous small, framed photographs and some clothing items. A logo on the left side of the screen reads "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST," and text on the right reads "BOSS TALK JOY." As the scene progresses, the man speaks, his mouth opening and closing, and he slightly shifts his head and gaze. In the final segment, his left arm moves slightly as he continues to talk into the microphone. The lighting is consistent throughout the sequence, and the camera remains in a static medium shot.
